message:
test(oracle): add 13 conformance tests (s388-s400) covering GROUP BY expressions, UPSERT, datetime, blobs

GROUP BY expression/CASE/HAVING, multiple aggregates with CASE,
correlated scalar subqueries, NOT EXISTS, complex ORDER BY,
UPSERT ON CONFLICT, subquery in FROM, LIMIT/OFFSET edges,
multi-insert VALUES, date/time functions, blob operations,
TOTAL vs SUM, COLLATE NOCASE.

714 pass, 0 fail, 8 ignored.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
